content:
For May, do we want to participate host an FSF LibreLocal event again? See #boston > 2025-05 meetup and https://libreplanet.org/wiki/FSF40/meetups for what we did last year, which was to meet at Hamilton at 7pm.

According to the email I got from the FSF, https://www.fsf.org/blogs/community/librelocal-2026-is-in-may-start-organizing-meetups is the place to look for details for this year. There's a chance they would even send a little money our way for food and drinks if we submit a request via https://my.fsf.org/librelocal-2026-support-request by March 15th.
I guess we missed the March 15th deadline. Whoops.
I'm traveling a fair amount in May. I'm leaning toward meeting at Time Out the evening of Sunday, May 24th or Sunday, May 31st. Does either day work for anyone?
i think both work for me

I'm leaning toward the 31st because I don't get back from my trip until the 19th. So I'd have a bit more time to get the word out.

@channel any other opinions on the date? (I kind of assume we're still only looking at Sunday nights.)

Also, I'm still considering Time Out the default location. It's been working quite well the last two times!
Yeah I like Time Out
31 is fine
Great! I'll update the website when I get a minute.
Done! Updated.
Huh, I can't seem to add our event to https://libreplanet.org/wiki/Group:Librelocal/2026 . Does anyone else have an account and want to try?
omg my username is I'll_logic instead of ill_logic. I thought maybe I made a typo in my password manager but the login actually works. (maybe they just ignore the apostrophe?)
I feel like I may have created the account on my phone during a Libreplanet event.
Should I name you as the organizer @Philip Durbin ? It's optional.
Also - I linked Signal and Zulip on their wiki. Bad idea?
It looks like last time we put [https://bostonopen.dev Boston Open Dev] as the organizer so I just did the same.
Okay you got in then?
Yeah. Thanks for adding the rest! I think the Signal and Zulip links are great.

I added my own meetup :-D https://libreplanet.org/wiki/Group:Librelocal/2026#United_States_.28Dover.2C_NH.29 I should have done it for Thursday. But I emailed them and they're okay with June 4. I'll try to do it on time next time.
is this a separate meetup from the Time out market on the 31?
Yeah I'm putting something together in New Hampshire. I'm just mentioning it here for fun.
Sorry for the confusion.
@Dan no worries, thanks for mentioning it!
https://floss.social/@bostonopen/116650170882470152
@Dan looks great! Thanks!
@all if you're planning on coming on Sunday (7pm at Time Out), please feel free to give a :thumbs_up:
I made a separate poll on Signal.
Cool. I wiped my phone a while ago and haven't reinstalled Signal. :sweat_smile:
I'll give you the tally on the day of or just ask.
Signal hasn't locked me out of the desktop version yet so I was able to check but thanks. :smile: From what I understand I need to connect to Signal via phone every so often or I'll get locked out.
6 yes and 3 maybe

Hi, I'm planning to come to the meetup tonight at time out market. I haven't been out to one of these Boston Open Dev events before. Just RSVP'ing, and I'm guessing I'll be able to find everyone at one of the tables. I also just requested to join the Signal group for Boston Open Dev. I was at the FSF40 event last year and the meetup afterwards at Time Out Market.
